source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Squares $ABCD$ and $EFGH$ are equal in area.  Vertices $B$, $E$, $C$, and $H$ lie on the same line.  Diagonal $AC$ is extended to $J$, the midpoint of $GH$.  What is the fraction of the two squares that is shaded? <image1>
